args.code: (async()=>{ await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,4000)); const body=document.body.innerText||""; const rows=[...document.querySelectorAll("tr,.ant-table-row,.vxe-body--row,li,div")].filter(e=>e.offsetParent!==null&&e.innerText&&e.innerText.includes("B0D9Q7FVMN")).map((e,i)=>({i,tag:e.tagName,cls:String(e.className),text:e.innerText.replace(/\s+/g," " ).slice(0,1500)})).slice(0,10); return JSON.stringify({url:location.href,title:document.title,found:rows.length>0,rows,bodyHas:body.includes("B0D9Q7FVMN")});})()
